questions.question: Is there a collision or physical contact between a worker and moving equipment (scissor lift, falling materials)?
Does any worker fall from a ladder, scaffold, or trip on debris/cables?
What type of contact or fall occurred?
options: A. Worker struck by moving equipment
B. Worker struck by falling object
D. Worker trip/fall on floor-level hazard

questions.question: What best describes the overall lighting level in the warehouse?
What best describes the floor surface condition?
Is any worker on a ladder in an unsafe manner (bad angle, overreaching, no three-point contact)?
Are cables, extension cords, or hoses creating a visible trip hazard across a walkway?
Is any worker near moving equipment (scissor lift, hoist) without maintaining safe clearance?
How many workers are visible in the scene?
Is any powered equipment (scissor lift, hoist) actively in motion?
Is any worker actively using a ladder or working at height?
